headline: Live Nation DOJ Antitrust Trial Puts Strong Stock Performance Under Scrutiny
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has opened a landmark antitrust trial targeting Live Nation Entertainment and its ticketing arm Ticketmaster. Prosecutors allege the company abused market power in live events and ticketing, potentially harming artists, venues, and fans. The case could result in a court ordered breakup or significant changes to Live Nation's business practices. For investors watching NYSE:LYV, this trial lands at a time when the stock trades at $159.78 and has delivered a...

headline: Assessing Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: What Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) looks like right now Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock last closing at $159.78 and showing positive returns over the past month and past 3 months. For context, the company operates across concerts, ticketing, and sponsorship and advertising, reporting revenue of US$25.2b and a net loss of US$54.8m. These figures help frame how the market is currently valuing its live...
